'''Vycinyth''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forested]] resort [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Barnaba Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Its [[Tapani Arts and Sports Complex]] accommodated [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] races, [[Shockboxing/Legends|shockboxing]], and [[Cracian thumper]] races. The planet was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] and the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vilhon]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell, the [[Pelagia Freedom Force]], maintained a number of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] on Vycynith. It also had a safehouse on the planet.
